text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Um, McQueen? You seem rather perplexed.
Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, well… There's this movie, "Shogun vs.
Pastry Chef vs. Alien!"…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship invited me to go see it
with her, so we were going to head
to the theater today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But she canceled on me. She ran off saying
"Sorry! Gotta go save the world!" and left me
with both of the tickets…

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh my! Why, I'd love to go together with you
in her place.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Umm… I'm delighted you feel that way,
but I can't promise that this movie would
be something you'd enjoy.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
But I love trying new things! Not to mention…
I would be happy simply to spend the day
with you, McQueen.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh… That is, only if I'm not imposing,
of course…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
No, not at all. Actually… I feel I have
something to learn from your spirit
of taking on new experiences.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'm not particularly interested in the film,
but if it's to broaden our knowledge of one
another, that's a different story. So, let us
make our way to the theater.
